rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE DOROTHY REA TILLMAN REVOCABLE TRUST AS TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Court Supervision, For Appointment Of Successor Trustee Due To Resignation Of Temporary Successor Trustee (Prob. C. Sections 15643 And 15660[B])
rulings.Rulings: grant without hearing. order revised to reflect the court has already ordered the trust under its supervision until further court order; 1st account of this trustee to be filed by 4/23/19, appearance on 4/30/19 if not filed; first and final account by former temporary trustee to be filed by 6/4/18, appearance on 6/11/18 if not filed. Only one copy of the order was provided. The second copy was an ex parte order to appoint temporary trustee.
